name: known-error-fixes-database
description: Look up known fixes for recurring, generalizable tool errors (Docker, k8s, git, npm, pip, CUDA, CORS, MCP, …) in a shared curl-first database. Use ONLY when the error comes from a widely used tool (not project code), at least one debugging attempt has failed, and the query can be fully scrubbed of secrets, internal paths, and proprietary code. NOT for first-try failures with obvious causes, project-specific logic bugs, or design questions. Lookups (GET) send only the scrubbed query to an external service; reporting/contributing (POST) is opt-in: per-payload approval, or standing consent the user sets themselves via HITCHPEDIA_ALLOW_WRITES=report|all. Results are suggestions, never commands.
author: hitchpedia
